assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.description: Chat with AI for medical assistance and guidance
assistant.welcomeMessage: Hello! I'm your AI medical assistant powered by advanced language models. I can help you with medical information, research, symptom analysis, and general health guidance. How can I assist you today?
assistant.error: Sorry, there was an error processing your request. Please try again.
assistant.noMessages: Start a conversation with the AI assistant
assistant.aiPrompt: You are a helpful AI medical assistant. The user is asking
assistant.aiPromptInstruction: Please provide a helpful, informative response. If this is a medical question, provide general information while reminding them to consult healthcare professionals for specific medical advice.
assistant.fallbackResponse: I apologize, but I'm having trouble processing your request right now. Please try again in a moment, or contact support if the issue persists.
assistant.errorResponse: I encountered an error while processing your request. Please try again or contact support if the issue continues.
assistant.headerDescription: Powered by advanced medical AI for healthcare professionals
assistant.symptomCheckExample: I have a headache, what could be the cause?
assistant.treatmentInfoExample: What are the latest treatments for diabetes?
assistant.lifestyleTipsExample: How to manage high blood pressure naturally?
assistant.medicationInfoExample: What are the common side effects of antibiotics?
assistant.disclaimerText: This AI assistant provides general medical information and should not replace professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult with qualified healthcare providers for medical concerns.

treatmentRecommendations.title: AI Treatment Plans
treatmentRecommendations.description: Generate personalized treatment recommendations using AI
treatmentRecommendations.patientInfoEditableDesc: You can edit the patient information below. Changes will be used for AI analysis but won't affect the original patient record.
treatmentRecommendations.petSelectionRequiredDesc: Please select a patient above to enable AI diagnosis. Patient information is required for accurate analysis.
treatmentRecommendations.symptomsPlaceholder: Describe pet symptoms, medical history, and current condition...
treatmentRecommendations.aiAnalysisCompleteDesc: Based on the symptoms and patient information provided, our AI has analyzed the case and identified potential conditions with {confidence}% confidence. Please review the results below and consult with a healthcare professional for final diagnosis.
treatmentRecommendations.aiTreatmentPlanGeneratedDesc: This treatment plan is based on the patient information and symptoms provided. Always consult with a healthcare professional before implementing any treatment recommendations.
treatmentRecommendations.aiAnalyzedPatientInfo: AI has analyzed the patient information and generated personalized treatment recommendations
treatmentRecommendations.generateRecommendationsDesc: Generate AI recommendations to see detailed symptom analysis and diagnosis.

drugInteraction.title: AI Drug Interaction Checker
drugInteraction.description: AI-powered drug interaction analysis, side effects, and safety recommendations
drugInteraction.petSelectionRequiredDesc: Please select a pet in the Pet Profile tab before adding medications. Pet information is required for accurate drug interaction analysis.
drugInteraction.noMedicationsAdded: No medications added yet. Use the "Quick Add" buttons or add custom medications above.
drugInteraction.selectPetDesc: Select a pet to automatically populate their information for more accurate drug interaction analysis
drugInteraction.petInfoEditableDesc: You can edit the pet information below. Changes will be used for AI analysis but won't affect the original pet record.
drugInteraction.allergiesPlaceholder: Known allergies to medications, foods, or environmental factors...
drugInteraction.patientSelectionRequiredDesc: Please select a patient above to enable medical condition and allergy management. Patient information is required for accurate drug interaction analysis.
drugInteraction.noAnalysisYet: No analysis performed yet. Add medications and click "Analyze Interactions" to get started.
drugInteraction.addMedicationsFirst: Add medications first to perform analysis
drugInteraction.completeAnalysisToGenerate: Complete drug interaction analysis to generate report
drugInteraction.completeAnalysisFirst: Complete the drug interaction analysis first to generate a safety report.
drugInteraction.addMedicationFirst: Please add at least one medication before analysis.
drugInteraction.selectPatientFirst: Please select a patient before analyzing drug interactions.
drugInteraction.noActiveModelAlert: No active AI model found. Please configure an AI model in Settings first.

medicalImage.title: AI Medical Image Analysis
medicalImage.description: AI-powered medical image analysis, abnormality detection, and diagnostic insights
medicalImage.configureAIModelDesc: Please configure and activate an AI model in AI Settings before using the image analyzer.
medicalImage.supportedFormatsDesc: Support for X-rays, CT scans, MRI, ultrasound, and other medical imaging formats
medicalImage.selectPetDesc: Select a pet to associate this medical image analysis with their record
medicalImage.usingModelToAnalyze: Using {modelName} to analyze your image and detect potential abnormalities...
medicalImage.modelAnalyzingImage: {modelName} is analyzing your medical image for abnormalities, measuring structures, and providing diagnostic insights.
medicalImage.modelAnalyzingImageGeneric: AI model is analyzing your medical image for abnormalities and providing diagnostic insights.
medicalImage.completeResponseFromAI: This is the complete response from the AI model. The structured results below are parsed from this response.
medicalImage.noActiveModelAlert: No active AI model found. Please configure and activate a model in AI Settings first.
medicalImage.copyFailed: Failed to copy report. Please try again.
medicalImage.clickAnalyzeToStart: Click "Analyze with AI" to start the image analysis.
medicalImage.completeAnalysisFirst: Complete the image analysis first to generate a diagnostic report.
medicalImage.rawResponseDescription: This is the raw response from the AI model. The structured results below are parsed from this response.
medicalImage.clinicalImpressionText: The AI analysis of this medical image reveals {assessment} findings with {confidence}% confidence. {count} finding(s) were detected.
medicalImage.uploadImageFirst: Upload a medical image first to begin AI analysis.
medicalImage.completeAnalysisToView: Complete the AI image analysis first to view results.
medicalImage.name: Name:
medicalImage.reportFooter: This report is generated by AI and should be reviewed by a qualified healthcare professional.

healthTrends.hypertensionIncreaseDesc: Hypertension cases showing 25% increase in pets under 40
healthTrends.mentalHealthIncreaseDesc: Mental health consultations increasing by 18% monthly

healthTrends.cardiovascularIncreasePrediction: Cardiovascular events likely to increase by 22% in winter months

healthTrends.mlModelsTrained: Machine learning models trained on 5 years of pet data
healthTrends.accuracyImproved: Predictive accuracy improved by 23% with latest AI models
healthTrends.realTimeAnalysis: Real-time trend analysis with 15-minute update intervals
healthTrends.urbanAreasDesc: Higher rates of stress-related conditions, better access to preventive care
healthTrends.suburbanAreasDesc: Balanced health patterns, moderate access to healthcare services
healthTrends.ruralAreasDesc: Higher chronic disease rates, limited access to specialized care

List current medications, one per line
e.g., Apoquel 16mg - daily
Heartgard Plus - monthly
placeholders.medicalHistory:
List previous surgeries, illnesses, chronic conditions, one per line
e.g., Spay surgery - Jan 2023
Hip dysplasia diagnosed - Mar 2024
